feature.name: Restricting spelling and grammar highlights
feature.creator: arichiv@chromium.org
feature.summary:
This experiment would change when spelling and grammar hints are applied to text fields to reduce the of websites ability to extract information about the user’s dictionary, specifically:
* Hints would not be applied to a text field that has not had user interaction (an autofocus is insufficient, there must be a click or key press of some kind relative to that field).
* Hints would only be applied once per user interaction (the text cannot be changed programmatically and have hints applied without a click or key press of some kind relative to that field).

* Hints would not be applied to a text field that has not had user interaction (an autofocus is insufficient, there must be a click or key press of some kind relative to that field).
* Hints would only be applied once per user interaction (the text cannot be changed programmatically and have hints applied without a click or key press of some kind relative to that field).
 Category: User input. Blink component: Blink>Editing>Spellcheck. Stars: 63.

wideReview.finding: Feature maps to official WebDX feature 'spelling-grammar-error'. Cross-engine positions not verified in this report.

adoption.finding: The WebDX/WebFeature counter 'SpellingGrammarError' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 192) measured 0.7003% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2024-11-15 with 561 data points. Mapping confidence: declared-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the SpellingGrammarError family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 143 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
